---
title: "chisq_test_analysis"
author: "Changyi"
date: "2026-02-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(poolSeq)
library(data.table)
library(ggsignif)
library(ggpubr)
library(corrplot)

col_anc<-"#6e326e"
col_cons<-"#4fc0c6"
col_fluc<-"#e8a11c"

```

# 1. load data
```{r}
#chisq results
##fluctuating
chisq_fluc<-fread("../../00data/genomic_data/fluctuating_F0_F60_Chisq.result.gz", 
                  select = c("chr","pos","r1_adj_p", "r2_adj_p","r3_adj_p","r4_adj_p","r5_adj_p"))
colnames(chisq_fluc)<-c("chr","pos",
                        paste0("Fluc_R", 1:5))
##constant
chisq_cons<-fread("../../00data/genomic_data/constant_F0_F60_Chisq.result.gz", 
                  select = c("chr","pos","r1_adj_p", "r2_adj_p","r3_adj_p","r4_adj_p","r5_adj_p"))
colnames(chisq_cons)<-c("chr","pos",
                        paste0("Cons_R", 1:5))

#combine results
chisq_comb<-merge(chisq_fluc, chisq_cons, by = c("chr", "pos"), all = TRUE)
#re-fill NA with 1. Those SNPs were filtered out when performing treatment specific test, as they don't change allele frequency in the focal population
cols_to_fill <- setdiff(names(chisq_comb), c("chr","pos"))
invisible(chisq_comb[, (cols_to_fill) := lapply(.SD, function(x) fifelse(is.na(x), 1.0000, x)), .SDcols = cols_to_fill])

#focus on the SNPs show significant
chisq_sig <- chisq_comb[
  chisq_comb[, do.call(pmin, .SD) < 0.05, .SDcols = cols_to_fill]
]

#check in which population that SNPs signifaicnt
##constant -- at least 1 replicates from constant populations have FDR p-value < 0.05, but none of the fluctuating replicates
##fluctuating -- at least 1 replicates from fluctuating populations have FDR p-value < 0.05, but none of the constant replicates
##constant -- both constant and fluctuating replicate have FDR p-value < 0.05
fluc_cols <- grep("Fluc",colnames(chisq_sig), value = TRUE)
cons_cols <- grep("Cons",colnames(chisq_sig), value = TRUE)

invisible(chisq_sig[, Significance := {
  sig_fluc <- rowSums(.SD[, ..fluc_cols] <0.05) > 0
  sig_cons <- rowSums(.SD[, ..cons_cols] <0.05) > 0
  
  fifelse(sig_fluc & !sig_cons, "Fluc",
          fifelse(sig_cons & !sig_fluc, "Cons",
                  fifelse(sig_fluc & sig_cons, "Common", "none"))) #there should be no "none" as they were filtered out
  
}])

invisible(chisq_sig[, loci := paste0(chr, ".", pos)])
fwrite(chisq_sig,file = "Chisq_result_sigSNP_fluc_cons.txt.gz",quote = FALSE, sep="\t")
rm(chisq_cons,chisq_fluc,chisq_comb,cols_to_fill, cons_cols, fluc_cols)
```


```{r}
#load af information
sync_file <- read.sync(file = "../../00data/genomic_data/F0_anc.F10-F60_F160_cons.F10-F60_F160_fluc.5rep.sync.gz", 
                  gen = rep(c(0,10,20,30,40,50,60,160,210,220,230,240,250,260,360), each = 5),
                  repl = rep(c(1,2,3,4,5), times = 15),
                  polarization = "minor")
af <- poolSeq::af(sync_file, gen = c(0,60,260), repl = 1:5) #F0, F60 cons and F60 fluctuating(marked as F260)
#keep only significant snps
af_sig <- as.data.table(af[rownames(af) %in% chisq_sig$loci,], keep.rownames = TRUE)
setnames(af_sig, old = "rn",new = "loci")
setnames(af_sig, old = paste0("F0.R",1:5,".freq"),
         new = paste0("Anc_F0.R",1:5,".freq"))
setnames(af_sig, old = paste0("F60.R",1:5,".freq"),
         new = paste0("Cons_F60.R",1:5,".freq"))
setnames(af_sig, old = paste0("F260.R",1:5,".freq"),
         new = paste0("Fluc_F60.R",1:5,".freq"))
#cons
for (i in 1:5){
  af_sig[, paste0("AFC_cons_r",i) := get(paste0("Cons_F60.R",i,".freq"))-get(paste0("Anc_F0.R",i,".freq"))]
}
#fluc
for (i in 1:5){
  af_sig[, paste0("AFC_fluc_r",i) := get(paste0("Fluc_F60.R",i,".freq"))-get(paste0("Anc_F0.R",i,".freq"))]
}



fwrite(af_sig, file="Chisq_sig_SNP_af.txt.gz", quote = FALSE, sep="\t", )
#fwrite(afc, file = "Chisq_sig_SNP_AFC.txt.gz", quote = FALSE, sep = "\t")
rm(sync_file)
rm(af,af_sig,i)

```

#2. AFC distribution
```{r}
chisq_sig<-fread("Chisq_result_sigSNP_fluc_cons.txt.gz")
af_sig<-fread("Chisq_sig_SNP_af.txt.gz")
setnames(af_sig, "rn","loci")
#extract AFC
summary_info<-merge(af_sig, chisq_sig, by = "loci")
fluc_cols <- grep("^AFC_fluc",names(summary_info), value = TRUE)
cons_cols <- grep("^AFC_cons",names(summary_info), value = TRUE)

invisible(summary_info[, `:=` (
  median_fluc = apply(.SD[, ..fluc_cols], 1, median, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_cons = apply(.SD[, ..cons_cols], 1, median, na.rm = TRUE)
) ])
#summary_info[, consistency := fifelse(median_fluc*median_cons>0, 1, -1)]


```
##2.1 SNPs significant in the fluctuating population
```{r}
afc_info<-summary_info[Significance == "Fluc", c("loci","median_fluc", "median_cons", "Significance")]
#polarize SNPs to increase frequency in the focal environment
rows_to_flip <- afc_info$median_fluc<0

afc_cols <- c("median_fluc","median_cons") 
invisible(afc_info[rows_to_flip, (afc_cols) := lapply(.SD, function(x) -x), .SDcols = afc_cols])
dt_afc<-melt(afc_info, measure.vars = c("median_cons","median_fluc"), na.rm = TRUE)
invisible(dt_afc[, environment := fifelse(variable=="median_cons", "Constant", "Fluctuating")])

p_fluc<-ggplot(dt_afc, aes(x = value, fill = environment))+
  geom_density(trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.3)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4fc0c6","#ea811c"))+
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(median(afc_info$median_cons, na.rm = TRUE), median(afc_info$median_fluc, na.rm = TRUE)),
    linetype="dashed", color=c("#4fc0c6","#ea811c")
    ) +
  labs(
    x="Median Allele Frequency Change",
    y="Density",
    title="SNPs significant in the Fluc population"
    ) +
  xlim(c(-1,1))+ylim(c(0,15))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = 'none')
plot(p_fluc)
```
##2.2 SNPs significant in the constant population
```{r}
afc_info<-summary_info[Significance == "Cons", c("loci","median_fluc", "median_cons", "Significance")]
#polarize SNPs to increase frequency in the focal environment
rows_to_flip <- afc_info$median_cons<0

afc_cols <- c("median_fluc","median_cons") 
invisible(afc_info[rows_to_flip, (afc_cols) := lapply(.SD, function(x) -x), .SDcols = afc_cols])
dt_afc<-melt(afc_info, measure.vars = c("median_cons","median_fluc"), na.rm = TRUE)
invisible(dt_afc[, environment := fifelse(variable=="median_cons", "Constant", "Fluctuating")])

p_cons<-ggplot(dt_afc, aes(x = value, fill = environment))+
  geom_density(trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.3)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#4fc0c6","#ea811c"))+
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = c(median(afc_info$median_cons, na.rm = TRUE), median(afc_info$median_fluc, na.rm = TRUE)),
    linetype="dashed", color=c("#4fc0c6","#ea811c")
    ) +
  labs(
    x="Median Allele Frequency Change",
    y="Density",
    title="SNPs significant in the Cons population"
    ) +
  xlim(c(-1,1))+ylim(c(0,15))+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = 'none')
plot(p_cons)
```
##2.3 combine plot
```{r}
p_merge<-ggarrange(p_fluc,p_cons,nrow=2, common.legend = TRUE)
ggsave("Chisq_median_AFC_distribution.pdf", plot=p_merge, width=8,height = 5)

```

#3. AFC correlation
##3.1 corr matrix
```{r}

#cor_col=colorRampPalette(c("#86C082", "#FBE992", "#F7D28A", "#F2BA83", "#EDA37D", "#EB8C77", "#E87671"))
cor_col=colorRampPalette(c("#86C082", "#F2BA83", "#E87671"))
afc_cor_pair <- data.table()
pdf("Chisq_AFC_corrplot.pdf", width=15, height = 15)
afc_cols <- grep("^AFC", names(af_sig), value = TRUE)
afc_cor<-cor(af_sig[, ..afc_cols],
             method = "pearson", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
diag(afc_cor)<-NA
corrplot(afc_cor, is.corr = FALSE,diag = FALSE, type = "full",
         method = 'color', tl.col = 'darkred', tl.pos = "d", tl.cex = 0.8, col = cor_col(120), col.lim = c(-0.2,0.2)) 
corrplot(afc_cor, add = TRUE, is.corr = FALSE, diag = FALSE, type = "full",
         method = 'number',  col = 'black', bg=NULL, cl.pos = 'n', number.cex = 0.7, number.digits = 3, tl.pos = 'n', col.lim = c(-0.2,0.2)) 
dev.off()
```


##3.2 boxplot
```{r}
pairs <- which(upper.tri(afc_cor), arr.ind = TRUE)
afc_cor_pair <- data.table(
  sample1 = colnames(afc_cor)[pairs[,1]],
  sample2 = colnames(afc_cor)[pairs[,2]],
  correlation = afc_cor[pairs])

extract_parts <- function(x){
    parts <- tstrsplit(x, "_")
    list(envir = parts[[2]], rep = parts[[3]])
    }

afc_cor_pair[, c("sample1_envir", "sample1_rep") := extract_parts(sample1)]
afc_cor_pair[, c("sample2_envir", "sample2_rep") := extract_parts(sample2)]
afc_cor_pair[, category1 := fifelse(sample1_envir == sample2_envir, "within_treatment", "between_treatment")]
afc_cor_pair[, category1 := factor(category1)]

afc_cor_pair[, category := fifelse(sample1_envir == sample2_envir, "within_treatment",
                                     fifelse(sample1_rep == sample2_rep & sample1_envir != sample2_envir, "same_replicate","between_treatment"))]
afc_cor_pair[, category := factor(category, levels = c("same_replicate", "within_treatment","between_treatment"))]

p<- ggplot(afc_cor_pair, aes(x=category, y=correlation, fill = category))+
    geom_boxplot()+
    geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("between_treatment","within_treatment")),
                                   #c("between_treatment","same_replicate"),
                                   #c("within_treatment","same_replicate")),
                #y_position = c(0.4,0.5,0.45),
                map_signif_level = TRUE,
                test = "wilcox.test", 
                test.args = list(alternative = "less"))+
    #facet_wrap(~focal_snp, nrow = 2)+
    labs(title = "Allele Frequency change correlation", x = "Comparison")+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = "black"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size=15),title = element_text(size=18))
ggsave(filename = "Chisq_AFC_correlation_boxplot.pdf",plot = p, width=8,height = 5)
```

```{r}
for (pop in c("cons","fluc")){
  for (rep in 1:5){
    focal_snp <- chisq[get(paste0(pop,"_r",rep))<0.05, loci]
    afc_cols <- c(paste0("AFC_cons_r",1:5),paste0("AFC_fluc_r",1:5))
    rep_afc<-af_sig[loci %in% focal_snp,..afc_cols]
    setnames(rep_afc,
             old = c(paste0("AFC_cons_r",1:5),paste0("AFC_fluc_r",1:5)),
             new = c(paste0("cons_r",1:5),paste0("fluc_r",1:5)))
    afc_cor<-cor(rep_afc, method = "pearson", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
    diag(afc_cor) <- NA
    #pdf("plots/AFC_cor_cons_r",rep,".pdf")
    corrplot(afc_cor, is.corr = FALSE,diag = FALSE, type = "full",
             method = 'color', tl.col = 'darkred', tl.pos = "d", tl.cex = 0.8, col = cor_col(120), col.lim = c(-0.05,0.5)) 
    corrplot(afc_cor, add = TRUE, is.corr = FALSE, diag = FALSE, type = "full",
             method = 'number',  col = 'black', bg=NULL, cl.pos = 'n', number.cex = 0.7, number.digits = 3, tl.pos = 'n', col.lim = c(-0.05,0.4)) 
    title(paste0(pop,"_r",rep))
    #corrplot(afc_cor, method = "color", type = "upper", diag = FALSE)
             #lower = 'number', lower.col = 'black', number.cex=0.6,
             #       upper = 'shade',  cl.lim = c(-0.5,1),
            #        tl.pos = 'lt', diag = 'n')
    #dev.off()
    pairs <- which(upper.tri(afc_cor), arr.ind = TRUE)
    temp_afc_cor_pair <- data.table(
      focal_snp = paste0(pop,"_r",rep),
      sample1 = colnames(afc_cor)[pairs[,1]],
      sample2 = colnames(afc_cor)[pairs[,2]],
      correlation = afc_cor[pairs])
    afc_cor_pair<-rbind(afc_cor_pair, temp_afc_cor_pair)
  }
}
dev.off()



```

#4. compare the absolute AFC distribution

##4.1 statistical test
```{r}
summary_info<-merge(af_sig, chisq_sig, by = "loci")
fluc_cols <- grep("^AFC_fluc",names(summary_info), value = TRUE)
cons_cols <- grep("^AFC_cons",names(summary_info), value = TRUE)

summary_info[, `:=` (
  median_fluc = apply(.SD[, ..fluc_cols], 1, median, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_cons = apply(.SD[, ..cons_cols], 1, median, na.rm = TRUE)
) ]
#summary_info[, consistency := fifelse(median_fluc*median_cons>0, 1, -1)]

summary_info[, `:=` (
  abs_median_fluc = abs(median_fluc),
  abs_median_cons = abs(median_cons)
)]



##permutation test for the variance
perm_test <- function(DT, value_col,
                      alternative = c("less","greater"), n_perm=10000, seed=123){
  alternative <- match.arg(alternative)
  set.seed(seed)
  
  x<-DT[Significance=="Fluc", get(value_col)]
  y<-DT[Significance=="Cons", get(value_col)]
  #observed differences
  var_diff_obs <- var(x)-var(y) #test for the variance
  mean_diff_obs <- mean(x) - mean(y) #test for the mean
  median_diff_obs <- median(x) - median(y)

  #combine all data
  all_vals <-c(x,y)
  n_x <- length(x)

  #permutation
  perm_diffs <- replicate(n_perm, {
    perm_labels <- sample(all_vals)
    perm_x <- perm_labels[1:n_x]
    perm_y <- perm_labels[(n_x+1):length(all_vals)]
    c(mean(perm_x) - mean(perm_y),
      median(perm_x) - median(perm_y),
      var(perm_x) - var(perm_y))
    })

  #One-sided p-value
  mean_p <- switch(alternative,
                    "less" = mean(perm_diffs[1,] <= mean_diff_obs),
                    "greater" = mean(perm_diffs[1,] >= mean_diff_obs))
  median_p <- switch(alternative,
                    "less" = mean(perm_diffs[2,] <= median_diff_obs),
                    "greater" = mean(perm_diffs[2,] >= median_diff_obs))
  var_p <- switch(alternative,
                    "less" = mean(perm_diffs[3,] <= var_diff_obs),
                    "greater" = mean(perm_diffs[3,] >= var_diff_obs))
  list(
    mean_obs = mean_diff_obs,
    mean_p = mean_p,
    median_obs = median_diff_obs,
    median_p = median_p,
    var_obs = var_diff_obs,
    var_p = var_p,
    perm_diffs = perm_diffs
  )
}

#test under 2818 environment
permu_2818<-perm_test(DT = summary_info[Significance!= "Common",],
          value_col = "abs_median_fluc",
          alternative = "greater")

#test under 23 environment
permu_23<-perm_test(DT = summary_info[Significance!= "Common",],
          value_col = "abs_median_cons",
          alternative = "less")

```

##4.2 plot absolute AFC
```{r}



#AFC distribution under 2818 environments
p_fluc<-ggplot(summary_info, aes(x=Significance, y=abs_median_fluc, fill = Significance))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3)+
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("Cons","Fluc")),
              annotations = "Permutation test: p < 1e-4")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_anc, col_cons, col_fluc))+
  labs(x="Population",y="|Median Allele Frequency Change|", title = "Evolution in 28/18")+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = alpha(col_fluc, 0.3)),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size=15),title = element_text(size=18))
ggsave(file="Chisq_2818_medianAFC.pdf", plot = p_fluc, width = 8, height = 5)
#AFC distribution under 23 environments
p_cons<-ggplot(summary_info, aes(x=Significance, y=abs_median_cons, fill = Significance))+
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.3)+
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("Cons","Fluc")),
              annotations = "Permutation test: p < 1e-4")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_anc, col_cons, col_fluc))+
  labs(x="Population",y="|Median Allele Frequency Change|", title = "Evolution in 23")+
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = alpha(col_cons, 0.3)),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size=15),title = element_text(size=18))
ggsave(file="Chisq_23_medianAFC.pdf", plot = p_cons, width = 8, height = 5)
```
